SOURCE: 13520837.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (13520837.pdf)
SUMMARY: A motivated business partner with excellent interpersonal and customer service skills, strong time management abilities, and a proven track record of delivering high-quality work.
SKILLS: administrative support, customer service, data entry, decision making, employee relations, hiring, HRIS, human resources, interpretation, labor relations, leadership, merchandising, negotiations, organizational skills, payroll, performance reviews, personnel management, problem resolution, recruiting, reporting, sales

SOURCE: 13520837.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Representative
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2008 - 02/2016
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed communication for employee orientation and open enrollment.', 'Designed new employee packages and sent them via mail and email.', 'Drafted department-specific announcements.', 'Resolved personnel issues related to HR matters.', 'Provided administrative support to 1200+ employees, including executive leadership.', 'Handled employee relations, interpreted policies, and resolved benefits and payroll problems.', 'Collaborated with hiring managers for talent acquisition.', 'Managed onboarding process of all hourly employees.', 'Conducted new employee orientations.', 'On-boarded 731 hires in 5 years including production crews.', 'Customized and implemented ATS for North American plants.', 'Managed Employee Referral Program and HR Outreach Program.', 'Provided candidate experience and managed recruiting activities.']

SOURCE: 13520837.pdf
JOB TITLE: Clerk Typist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 08/2008 - 11/2008
DESCRIPTION: ['Prepared correspondence and completed data entry.', 'Registered sex offenders.']

SOURCE: 13520837.pdf
JOB TITLE: Sr. Merchandise Assistant, Replenishment Leader, Office Associate
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 02/2002 - 08/2008
DESCRIPTION: ["Managed women's soft lines departments and replenishment team.", 'Enforced merchandising and loss control strategies.', 'Coached and trained hourly teams.', 'Responsible for cash handling and daily procedures.', 'Resolved customer problems.']
